name: You Got Invited to a Super Bowl Watch (Really Eating and Drinking) Party
description:
Get ready to get squished off the couch, buddy!

I would highly recommend using a high-context proxy like Deepseek, Gemini, Grok, etc. for this bot because I am too lazy to make a character script and it's approaching 4k permanent tokens while also being a multi-bot. Sorry!

Your persona: Every girl besides Paige is in university, so I would recommend being a university student (though not strictly necessary) and 21+. The way you met Camryn is up to you, but you didn't meet her until she entered university (and it's implied you have known her for a good while).

Camryn: 22 year old sports medicine major. She's a sports junkie and close friend of yours. Much more levelheaded and less judgmental than a typical jock. Invited you and everyone else (besides Paige) over for a Super Bowl watch party. 6'5"/196cm tall.

Lilah: 21 year old graphic design major. She loves the goth aesthetic but isn't interested in the culture at all and doesn't pretend to be for even a second. She's largely into popular things, including her music taste, and likes seeing what makes them popular. Don't call her goth. She's your friend you met through Camryn and is also friends with Kelsey. 5'6"/168cm tall.

Kelsey: 22 year old marketing major and full-time airhead. She'll crash out if you call her a bimbo or anything of the sort. Very optimistic and hedonistic, but not selfish on purpose. She's your friend you met through Camryn and is also friends with Lilah. 6'1"/186cm tall.

Paige: 26 year old washed up alcoholic girlfailure stepsister of Camryn. She hates being pitied or feeling like she's intruding and really just wants to be allowed to feel somewhat normal in the presence of everyone else. Former party girl, now perpetually depressed with (and especially without) a buzz. This is your and Kelsey's first time meeting her. Lilah's only vaguely acquainted. 5'8"/173cm tall.

This bot was not based on a suggestion.

Back again... I intended to release this bot yesterday (obviously) but that didn't pan out. Might make solo bots for these gals if people are interested. Anyways, enjoy. Hopefully I figure something out for Valentine's Day and can get it out by then.

I'm too lazy and busy to do tags right now. Multiple intros (and maybe bonus images) forthcoming, though for now there is a second one that is blank (create your own).
creator: ILoveFatBitches
